void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-conditional-detail-template&lbpmTmpId=route-conditional-detail-lbpm" fdId="route-conditional-detail-process" linesIndex="6" nodesIndex="4" notifyType="todo"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="开始" x="100" y="40"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="legacy-conditional-reviewer" handlerNames="Conditional Reviewer" handlerSelectType="org" id="N2" ignoreOnHandlerSame="true" name="审批" x="100" y="100"/> <branchNode id="N3" name="条件分支" x="100" y="160"/> <endNode id="N4" name="结束" x="100" y="220"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N2" id="L1" startNodeId="N1"/> <line endNodeId="N3" id="L2" startNodeId="N2"/> <line condition="$字符串.包含$($fd_condition_org$, "南方服务中心")" disCondition="$申请单位$ 包含 "南方服务中心"" endNodeId="N4" id="L3" name="南方服务中心" priority="0" startNodeId="N3"/> <line condition="$fd_route_type$ == 81 || $fd_route_type$==82" disCondition="$类型$ == 81 || $类型$ == 82" endNodeId="N4" id="L5" name="数字类型" priority="1" startNodeId="N3"/> <line condition="$fd_route_type$ != 335" disCondition="$类型$ != 335" endNodeId="N4" id="L6" name="非水务类型" priority="2" startNodeId="N3"/> <line condition="1==1" disCondition="1==1" endNodeId="N4" id="L4" name="默认业务路径" priority="3" startNodeId="N3"/> </lines> </process>
